Bo qua den noi dung chinh
TechShop
Digital Atelier
Sản phẩmĐơn hàngAI Demo
BrowseRAG DemoTài khoản
TechShop AI Commerce Demo

Nen tang mua sam da nganh
co AI tu van va RAG chatbot.

TechShop mo rong thanh storefront da nganh, ket hop catalog nhieu nhom product, AI service, knowledge base noi bo va luong demo thuc te cho bai toan tu van mua hang.

Catalog thuc te

Catalog da seed nhieu nhom product nhu dien tu, thoi trang, my pham va do gia dung.

Knowledge base van hanh

Chinh sach giao hang, thanh toan va doi tra duoc dua vao he thong tri thuc de truy hoi.

AI demo ro rang

Trang AI Demo hien thi luong RAG + chat, nguon du lieu va san pham lien quan ngay trong hoi dap.

Checklist doi chieu

5 nhom tieu chi duoc phan ra thanh cac bang chung co the xem truc tiep tren website.

Dat

Product/Service

Website can duoc hien thi it nhat 10 san pham/dich vu co noi dung that.

Dat

AI Service - Deep Model

Co AI service de phan loai y dinh, trich xuat thong tin va sinh cau tra loi.

Dat

AI Service - Knowledge Base

Co he thong tri thuc noi bo de tra loi chinh sach va ho tro sau ban.

Dat

AI Service - RAG + Chat

Chatbot co truy hoi context tu kho tri thuc va catalog san pham.

Dat

Tinh thuc tien / Demo

Co luong demo ro rang cho bai toan tu van mua hang thuc te.

San pham / dich vu noi bat

Danh sach hien thi 12 san pham dau tien trong catalog de dap ung va vuot moc toi thieu 10 san pham.

Catalog cong khai hien tai co 0 san pham dang hoat dong. Khu vuc ben duoi dang render 12 san pham tren trang chu de nguoi cham co the kiem tra ngay.

AI Service Stack

Nhung thanh phan cot loi hien dang phuc vu recommendation, retrieval va chat.

Mo hinh AI ung dung

AI assistant phan tich truy van, nhan dien nhu cau mua hang va tong hop cau tra loi phu hop.

Knowledge base noi bo

Tai lieu ve shipping, payment, return va support article duoc truy hoi cho chatbot.

RAG + chat demo

Nguoi dung co the hoi truc tiep, xem nguon tri thuc va danh sach san pham lien quan.

Knowledge Base Snapshot

Mot phan cac tai lieu tri thuc ma chatbot co the truy hoi khi nguoi dung hoi chinh sach va huong dan.

Knowledge base se hien thi day du sau khi du lieu AI duoc seed. Frontend da san sang doc va render cac tai lieu nay tu AI service.

Tinh thuc tien / Demo

Luong demo de nguoi cham co the tu thao tac va xac nhan cac tieu chi quan trong.

Buoc 1

Mo catalog de xem it nhat 10 san pham/dich vu dang hoat dong.

Buoc 2

Mo trang AI Demo va dat cau hoi ve ngan sach, nhom product hoac chinh sach doi tra.

Buoc 3

Xem cau tra loi RAG cung tai lieu nguon va san pham duoc de xuat de tiep tuc mua hang.

Mo AI DemoXem toan bo catalog

TechShop Experience Platform

Microservices Commerce Frontend + AI RAG Demo

Realtime InventoryAI AssistedSecure Checkout

Designed for interactive demo, knowledge-base-backed chat, and production-ready service integration.
